form.formComment: Missed the frame last time but the start prior recorded a solid 25.96 over 457m finishing third at Manawatu. Has the ability and right in the mix.

form.formComment: Finished fifth last time but the start prior was an eye-catching winner after leading throughout, scoring by 2 lengths in a Class 3 at Manawatu and recording a quick 25.90 over the 457m journey. Gets chance to atone.

form.formComment: Last start finished fourth in a Class 5 FIN on March 12 over 457m at Cambridge Raceway behind Own Class, beaten 6 lengths (26.32). Prepared to just watch this time.

form.formComment: Was in the placings last time but prior to that was an impressive winner after leading throughout, scoring by a long neck in a Class 4/5 at Manawatu and clocking a hot 25.80 for the 457m trip. In the mix again.

form.formComment: Consistent performer who is new here. Nice win last start easily by 5.5 lengths at Addington (30.15) beating Magic Jonty in a Class 5 on April 2. Can measure up again.

form.formComment: Form has been solid with minor placings at his last three starts. Last time out finished 2nd on April 2 over 525m at Addington behind Opawa Hass beaten 5.5 lengths (30.52) in a Class 5. In form but this is a test.

form.formComment: Has been out of the money of late. Could only manage eighth last time out over 525m at Addington. Tempted to look elsewhere.
